def _tiled_4k_raune(model, frame_4k: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
    """2×2 tiled RAUNE at 4K with 128-px overlap on inner seams, linear feathering.

    Tile size: 1984×1144. Tile positions (top-left):
      (0, 0), (0, fw - tile_w), (fh - tile_h, 0), (fh - tile_h, fw - tile_w).
    The two inner seams overlap by 128 px each; outer edges have no overlap.
    """
    assert frame_4k.shape == (1, 3, 2160, 3840), f"unexpected shape {frame_4k.shape}"
    fh, fw = 2160, 3840
    overlap = 128
    tile_h = (fh + overlap) // 2  # 1144
    tile_w = (fw + overlap) // 2  # 1984

    positions = [
        (0, 0),
        (0, fw - tile_w),
        (fh - tile_h, 0),
        (fh - tile_h, fw - tile_w),
    ]

    out = torch.zeros_like(frame_4k)
    weight = torch.zeros(1, 1, fh, fw, device=frame_4k.device, dtype=torch.float32)
